chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-338 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 10.05.2023 Mr. Naseer Ahmed Samoo advocate for petitioner. Mr. Samiullah Rind advocate for NTDC. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh and Mr. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon, APG along with Inspector Ghulam Abbas Mallah on behalf of SSP Jamshoro and Inspector Javed Akhtar on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad. ----- In terms of order dated 30.03.2023 Inspector Ghulam Abbas Mallah has submitted inquiry report stating that the petitioner’s son is prima facie involved in committing theft of nuts and bolts from electric poles. Learned counsel for petitioner submits that still in Crime No.46/2023 the Challan has not been submitted. The IO is directed to submit the Challan within one week and thereafter petitioner would be at liberty to avail the remedy before the trial court in accordance with law. This petition has already served its purpose and with consent of all is disposed of along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
